task_description: Replace the flat PreferenceScreen settings UI with a grid/card-based landing page (9 categories) where each card navigates to a sub-PreferenceFragment for that category. The Editor Tata Letak card opens LayoutEditorActivity directly. Manual layout editor slider preferences are hidden from settings UI.

verification.summary: BUILD SUCCESSFUL - ./gradlew assembleDebug completes in 5s. No test suite exists in this project, so build success is the primary validation. All 8 preference XMLs, 9 drawable icons, grid layout, card layout, and rewritten SettingsActivity.kt compile without errors.
